So clearly, there's quite a lot of AI involvement, and I know you've got the artifacts that are helping shape it and protect the information.

How do you protect sites from that?
Yeah, great question.
The answer is, like, really just having people review every piece of content, having people make manual changes, feeding all of this upfront insight, and also not trying to one-shot anything.
